query:
-- Create users for different roles
-- Password: password123 (in production, use proper hashing)

-- 1. Accountant (محاسب)
INSERT INTO users (username, full_name, role, password_hash, is_active)
VALUES ('accountant', 'محمد المحاسب', 'user', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_name = 'محمد المحاسب';

SET @accountant_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES 
  (@accountant_id, 'payroll_batch_accountant_review', 'global', '*'),
  (@accountant_id, 'view', 'payroll_batch', '*'),
  (@accountant_id, 'create', 'payroll_batch', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- 2. Financial Reviewer (مراجع مالي)
INSERT INTO users (username, full_name, role, password_hash, is_active)
VALUES ('financial_reviewer', 'أحمد المراجع المالي', 'user', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_name = 'أحمد المراجع المالي';

SET @reviewer_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES 
  (@reviewer_id, 'payroll_batch_financial_review', 'global', '*'),
  (@reviewer_id, 'view', 'payroll_batch', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- 3. Accounts Manager (مدير الحسابات)
INSERT INTO users (username, full_name, role, password_hash, is_active)
VALUES ('accounts_manager', 'خالد مدير الحسابات', 'user', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_name = 'خالد مدير الحسابات';

SET @manager_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES 
  (@manager_id, 'payroll_batch_manager_review', 'global', '*'),
  (@manager_id, 'view', 'payroll_batch', '*'),
  (@manager_id, 'export', 'payroll_batch', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- 4. HR Manager (مدير الموارد البشرية)
INSERT INTO users (username, full_name, role, password_hash, is_active)
VALUES ('hr_manager', 'فاطمة مديرة الموارد البشرية', 'user', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_name = 'فاطمة مديرة الموارد البشرية';

SET @hr_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES 
  (@hr_id, 'view', 'worker', '*'),
  (@hr_id, 'create', 'worker', '*'),
  (@hr_id, 'update', 'worker', '*'),
  (@hr_id, 'view', 'attendance', '*'),
  (@hr_id, 'export', 'attendance', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- 5. Security Guard (حارس الأمن)
INSERT INTO users (username, full_name, role, password_hash, is_active)
VALUES ('security_guard', 'عبدالله الحارس', 'user', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_name = 'عبدالله الحارس';

SET @guard_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES 
  (@guard_id, 'create', 'attendance', '*'),
  (@guard_id, 'view', 'attendance', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- Show created users
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.username,
  u.full_name,
  u.role,
  GROUP_CONCAT(up.permission) as permissions
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_permissions up ON u.id = up.user_id
WHERE u.username IN ('accountant', 'financial_reviewer', 'accounts_manager', 'hr_manager', 'security_guard')
GROUP BY u.id
ORDER BY u.id;
